# Getting Help

Thanks for using **Universal Hardware Description (UHD)**. Here is where to go,
depending on what you need:

- **Questions about using UHD** (how to model a component, matching, DRC, the
  data model): open a GitHub issue using the bug-report template, or start a
  discussion if the repository has Discussions enabled. General "how do I..."
  questions are welcome.
- **Proposing a schema or feature change:** open a feature-request issue first
  (before a PR) so the design can be discussed. See
  [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- **Security or safety-sensitive reports:** do not open a public issue. Follow
  [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
- **Commercial questions, partnerships, or private inquiries:**
  mark@deltaroboticsinc.com

Before filing, a quick search of existing
[issues](https://github.com/Delta-Robotics-Inc/OpenUHD/issues) often turns up an
answer.
